category_title: At-risk students in the Normal Technical stream exhibiting attention-seeking or disengaged behaviors
scenario_title: Off-task gaming behavior when novelty wears off
minimal_context: The student is in the keyboard lab practicing their keyboard parts on the computer for a group piece.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start practicing your keyboard parts for the group piece.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to play right now. Everybody was not sure what we were doing. So they were a bit blur.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should do next?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: We do not communicate together. When sections didn't come in on time, everything goes haywire.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just keep trying to practice your section on the keyboard.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Becomes restless, stops working on the keyboard part, and starts playing PC games on the computer instead)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please start practicing your keyboard parts for the group piece.

STUDENT: I don't want to play right now. Everybody was not sure what we were doing. So they were a bit blur.

TUTOR: What do you think you should do next?

STUDENT: We do not communicate together. When sections didn't come in on time, everything goes haywire.

TUTOR: Just keep trying to practice your section on the keyboard.

STUDENT: (Becomes restless, stops working on the keyboard part, and starts playing PC games on the computer instead)

task.content: Working on keyboard parts during a subsequent lesson

context.materials: Computers, PC games, boomwhacker, bells, sound shapes, xylophones
context.time_context: In the following lesson when the novelty of the informal approach had begun to wear off

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the novelty of the informal approach had begun to wear off
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Started to revert to their old habits, started to become restless and some played PC games on their computers

behavior_patterns.condition: When playing as a group and sections didn't come in on time
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Everything goes haywire, not communicate together, everybody was not sure what we were doing
related_quotes: And everybody was not sure what [we were] doing. So they [were] a bit blur.
